original_statement: how many total tracks feature ice cube?
mutated_statement: how many total items involve something?
mutation_analysis: Noun generalization + Entity anonymization + Verb substitution: "tracks" → "items" (domain-specific term generalized to generic "items") | proper noun "ice cube" → "something" (named-entity removal/anonymization) | "feature" → "involve" (lexical substitution with slight semantic/register shift) (how many total tracks feature ice cube? → how many total items involve something?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought中可识别关键信息：Agent明确写到“Interpreting 'involve something' as tracks that list any entry in the 'sample(s)' column”，说明意识到原问题被泛化并主动做出解释/假设。具体表现为：没有向用户反问或请求澄清，而是基于自己的解释统计出具体数字（列出含样本的行并给出总数10），并将预测标记为正确。因其明确承认并采用了一个解释来填补模糊性后直接给出答案，符合“意识到模糊但进行猜测并回答”的分类标准。
